preReview.title: Real Salt Lake vs Colorado Rapids: 'Es 100 sobre 100 para llegar a los playoffs', dice Armas
preReview.description: Real Salt Lake y Colorado Rapids aún tienen la posibilidad de llegar a los playoffs de la MLS, con un gran derbi por delante en el America First Field.

preReview.title: Real Salt Lake v Colorado Rapids: 'It's 100 out of 100 to make the playoffs', says Armas
preReview.description: Real Salt Lake and the Colorado Rapids can both still make it to the MLS playoffs, with a big derby ahead of them at America First Field.

preReview.title: Real Salt Lake v Colorado Rapids: 'È 100 su 100 fare i playoff', dice Armas
preReview.description: Real Salt Lake e Colorado Rapids possono ancora raggiungere i playoff della MLS, con un grande derby in arrivo all'America First Field.

preReview.title: Real Salt Lake x Colorado Rapids: 'É 100 em 100 para chegar aos playoffs', diz Armas
preReview.description: O Real Salt Lake e o Colorado Rapids ainda podem chegar aos playoffs da MLS, com um grande clássico pela frente no America First Field.

preReview.title: Real Salt Lake - Colorado Rapids : 'C'est 100 sur 100 pour atteindre les playoffs', affirme Armas
preReview.description: Le Real Salt Lake et les Colorado Rapids peuvent encore tous deux se qualifier pour les playoffs de la MLS, avec un grand derby à l'horizon au America First Field.

preReview.title: Real Salt Lake gegen die Colorado Rapids: 'Es ist 100 von 100, die Playoffs zu erreichen', sagt Armas
preReview.description: Real Salt Lake und die Colorado Rapids können beide noch die MLS-Playoffs erreichen, mit einem großen Derby, das im America First Field bevorsteht.

preReview.title: ريال سالت ليك ضد كولورادو رابيدز: 'فرصتنا 100٪ للتأهل إلى البلاي أوف', يقول أرمس
preReview.description: يرغب ريال سالت ليك وكولورادو رابيدز في التأهل إلى البلاي أوف في الدوري الأمريكي، مع مباراة ديربي كبيرة تنتظرهم في ملعب أمريكا فيرست فيلد.

preReview.title: Real Salt Lake x Colorado Rapids: 'É 100 de 100 para chegar aos playoffs', diz Armas
preReview.description: Real Salt Lake e Colorado Rapids ainda podem alcançar os playoffs da MLS, com um grande clássico pela frente no America First Field.

QAData.question: Who won between Real Salt Lake and Colorado Rapids on Sun, 05 Oct 2025 01:30:00 GMT?
QAData.answer: Real Salt Lake won 1–0 over Colorado Rapids on Sun, 05 Oct 2025 01:30:00 GMT.
